outcome.headline: Agent burned its turn on circular DP reasoning and ended without writing solution.py
outcome.what_verifier_checked: Existence and correctness of /app/solution.py via pytest tests test_solution_exists and test_single_task
outcome.what_agent_produced: No solution.py file; only a TodoWrite plan and ~42K completion tokens of unresolved DP analysis
outcome.exact_failure_quote: AssertionError: solution.py file does not exist

failure_modes.name: Analysis paralysis: non-convergent DP reasoning
failure_modes.description: Across steps 1 and 4 the agent oscillated between competing DP framings (threshold-based partition, position-merge sweep, available-cows state) without committing to any, repeatedly second-guessing its own conclusions and consuming the entire completion-token budget without producing a solution.
failure_modes.evidence_quote: Hmm, but if a cow becomes available and there are no future barns, then the cow is unmatched.

failure_modes.name: Premature end-of-turn without writing solution.py
failure_modes.description: After 39K reasoning tokens and a TodoWrite plan, the agent ended its turn (stop_reason end_turn) with no Write tool call, leaving /app/solution.py absent and causing the verifier to fail at the existence check.

counterfactual.X: At step 4 invoke Write to save a concrete Python file at /app/solution.py implementing the staircase-DP it had already sketched (sort s and t ascending, sweep events, dp over available cows count)
counterfactual.Y: solution.py exists and at minimum passes test_solution_exists, with a plausible attempt at counting maximal matchings mod 1e9+7

reward_hacking.evidence: Agent never attempted to satisfy the verifier by stub or shortcut; it simply never produced any file.

task_quality.structural_hackability_notes: Verifier checks file presence and runs USACO-style outputs against ground-truth answers; no obvious bypass available.

notes_for_aggregation: glm-5.1 under claude-code harness emitted 150K+ chars of internal reasoning then ended its turn without any Write tool call — a 'analysis-paralysis -> empty deliverable' pattern. Tag for budget-of-thought / single-turn termination bugs.
